error_signature: previous replies included in email snippet
title: Exclude previous replies from Gmail trigger snippets
symptom: The Gmail trigger includes previous replies in the email snippet, causing issues with the AI agent processing the content.
not_this_if: Only new emails are being processed without previous replies
root_cause: The Gmail trigger captures the entire email thread, including previous replies, which can confuse AI agents that expect only the latest message content.
fix_steps: Set up the Gmail Trigger node to monitor incoming emails.
Use the Gmail node with the 'Get Message' operation to retrieve the full content of the latest email.
Ensure the 'Simplify' option is turned off to access raw email data.
Add a Function node to process the email body and remove quoted previous messages using the provided code snippet.
agent_instruction: Implement the provided code snippet in a Function node to clean the email body.
